headline: Republic Services Ethics And Sustainability Honors Meet Valuation Debate For Investors
summary: Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) was named to Ethisphere's 2026 list of the World's Most Ethical Companies for the eighth time. The company was recognized in the S&P Global 2026 Sustainability Yearbook for its sustainability efforts. Republic Services also received Great Place to Work certification for the ninth consecutive year. Republic Services, a major player in U.S. waste and recycling services, sits at the intersection of essential infrastructure, environmental services, and local...
